testcases.input: primeFactors = 5 Output: 6 Explanation: 200 is a valid value of n. It has 5 prime factors: [2,2,2,5,5], and it has 6 nice divisors: [10,20,40,50,100,200]. There is not other value of n that has at most 5 prime factors and more nice divisors.
